extraction.one_line_summary: PADUN Mark soloed to victory on La Plagne after PORT Richie attacked in final 1km for time bonuses, taking yellow from LUTSENKO by 17 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Port attacked specifically inside final km targeting time bonuses rather than stage win, calculated yellow jersey math over glory.
Movistar paced descent after Col de Pré aggressively enough to drop Froome despite climbing well through three climbs.
Bahrain's Padun at 24 showed superior climbing to veteran Kuss on beyond-category terrain, unexpected strength hierarchy reversal.

rider_signals.PORT Richie: positive: Prioritized tactical time bonus finish over stage win to capture yellow, showing strong race intelligence at 36
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Climbed well through three ascents but dropped on descent by Movistar pace, descending now a weakness
rider_signals.PADUN Mark: positive: 24-year-old outclimbed Kuss on HC finish, first WT win reveals Bahrain developing unexpected GC depth
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexi: negative: Lost yellow despite defense, historical medium-mountain pedigree confirmed as ceiling on HC summit finishes
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: Dropped far from finish despite starting 39 seconds back, major form concern for Jumbo-Visma
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: neutral: Rode aggressively into KOM lead from second-wave breakaway chase group rather than original move
